sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51810" key="kaqignu=sai" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθιγνῦσαι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεκροῖς θῦσαι</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> (Apptly. corrupt for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καθαγνίσαι</foreign>.)</entryFree>
